title: Savory Flaky Syrian Pistachio Crumb
description: A nut-free savory crumb dish featuring ground pistachios mixed with a tangy pickle for a light and flavorful hangover cure.

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.amount: 6 tablespoons (all-purpose flour coating), 2 tablespoons (flaky crumbs coat)

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine ground pistachios and pickled red pepper relish.
Add room temperature unsalted butter, stirring until the mixture forms a dough-like consistency.
Roll out all-purpose flour between your palms until you have two layers of 1/4-inch thickness.
Gently form the dough into a rectangle shape using the flaky crumbs to coat it. Ensure a uniform coating on both sides.
Place coated dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, making sure not to overlap any areas.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the edges.
Allow to cool slightly before slicing into squares or triangles.
